endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HDInsight/clusters/{clusterName}/configurations
endpoints.description: Gets all configuration information for an HDI cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HDInsight/clusters/{clusterName}/configurations/{configurationName}
endpoints.description: The configuration object for the specified cluster. This API is not recommended and might be removed in the future. Please consider using List configurations API instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HDInsight/clusters/{clusterName}/configurations/{configurationName}
endpoints.description: Configures the HTTP settings on the specified cluster. This API is deprecated, please use UpdateGatewaySettings in cluster endpoint instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CLUSTERNAME}} with a real clustername.
